meta-review.comment:
Hippo Penny - Here's the Scoop on Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered!

As a seasoned grok video game commentator, I'm here to give you the lowdown on Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered. And let me tell you, it's a wild ride! But before we dive in, I've got to ask: Who needs a remaster, anyway? Well, apparently, this one does, because it's a technical marvel that brings the original game up to par with its sequel, Forbidden West.

First off, the visuals are stunning. I mean, seriously, you'll feel like you're right there in the sun-scorched desert, taking down robotic dinosaurs and whatnot. The new lighting, character models, and increased density of wildlife and vegetation make this remaster a true audiovisual marvel.

Now, some critics might say it's unnecessary (I'm looking at you, @TheGamer). But hey, who doesn't love a good excuse to replay Aloy's debut adventure with lovely visuals and a fresh list of trophies? It's like a digital vacation from the chaos of everyday life!

That being said, I do have some gripes. For instance, the upgrade fee might be a bit steep for some folks (it's $10, FYI). And let's be real, some of these remasters are just cash grabs (ahem, @Gameblog.fr).

Still, Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered is an excellent time to jump into the franchise or give it another try. Trust me, you won't regret it.

So there you have it - my two cents on this remastered masterpiece!
